title: brickellia eupatorioides var. corymbulosa
intro: Brickellia eupatorioides var. corymbulosa, also known as False Boneset, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Brickellia eupatorioides var. corymbulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
